convexity.ex: The degree of convexity was measured now.

convey.def: 傳達、運送、轉讓的人的人
convey.ex: Words cannot convey how happy I am.

conveyance.def: 運送、運輸工具、轉讓證書的人物 (單數)
conveyance.ex: The legal conveyance of land is done.

conveyancer.def: 財產轉讓律師人物 (單數)
conveyancer.ex: A skilled conveyancer handled the deal.

conveyor.def: 傳送者、搬運者的人物 (單數) (傳)
conveyor.ex: The luggage conveyor belt broke tonight.

convict.def: 證明有罪、囚犯、宣告有罪的人的人人物 (單數)
convict.ex: The escaped convict was caught in woods.

convicted.def: 證明有罪的、定罪的人的人 (或物)
convicted.ex: He is a convicted felon in three states.

conviction.def: 定罪、堅信、說服力的人物 (單數)
conviction.ex: She has a very deep religious conviction.

convince.ex: I managed to convince him to join us.

convinced.def: 確信的、說服了的人的人 (或物)
convinced.ex: She remains convinced of his innocence.

convincing.ex: He gave a very convincing argument today.

convincingly.ex: The case was proved convincingly tonight.

convivial.def: 歡樂的、友好的、愛社交的人的人物
convivial.ex: The party had a very convivial atmosphere.

convocation.def: 召集、大會、集會的人物 (單數)

convoke.ex: The king decided to convoke a parliament.

convoluted.def: 費解的、迴旋的的人的人 (或物)
convoluted.ex: The story was very convoluted and long.

convolution.def: 迴旋、盤旋、錯綜複雜的人物 (單數)
convolution.ex: The brain convolution is very intricate.

convoy.def: 護航、護送、車隊的人的人人物 (單數)
convoy.col: aid convoy, military convoy, travel in convoy
convoy.ex: The aid convoy reached the city today.

convulse.def: 抽搐、劇震、使不安的人的人
convulse.ex: People began to convulse with laughter.

convulsion.def: 抽搐、大震盪人物 (複數使用)

convulsive.def: 抽搐的人、劇烈的人的人物
convulsive.ex: He made several small convulsive movements.

cony/coney.ex: The soft coney fur was used to make a hat.

coo.def: 咕咕聲、柔聲說的人的人人物 (單數)
coo.ex: The dove made a soft coo in the tree.

cook.def: 煮、烹調、廚師、修改的人的人人物 (單數) (煮)
cook.col: cook for, good cook, cook the books (造假)
cook.ex: He was accused of trying to cook the books.

cooker.def: 炊具、烹調器具人物 (單數)
cooker.ex: She put the soup in a slow cooker today.

cookery.ex: He is taking a local cookery course now.

cookie/cooky.def: 餅乾、小甜餅、傢伙的人物 (單數)
cookie/cooky.ex: He is a very tough cookie to deal with.

cooking.ex: I really miss my mother's home cooking.

cool.def: 涼爽的、冷靜的、酷的人的人人物 (單數) (涼)
cool.col: keep cool, play it cool, stay cool
cool.ex: You must try to keep cool in a crisis.

coolant.ex: The engine needs more coolant tonight.

cooler.def: 冷卻器、冰袋、(口)監牢人物 (單數)
cooler.ex: Put the white wine in the cooler now.

coolie/cooly.ex: The poor coolie worked hard on the wharf.

coolly.ex: She answered all of his questions coolly.

coolness.def: 涼爽、冷靜、冷淡的人物 (單數)
coolness.ex: I admired his coolness under pressure.

coomb/combe.ex: The green coomb was hidden in the hills.

coon.ex: The gray coon visited the garden tonight.

coop.def: 雞籠、籠子、拘留的人的人人物 (單數)
coop.ex: I hate being cooped up in the office.

cooper.ex: The skilled cooper made a large barrel.

cooperate.ex: Local schools decided to cooperate today.

cooperation.def: 合作、協力的人物 (單數) (合)
cooperation.ex: The job requires close local cooperation.

cooperative.def: 合作的、協作的人的人人物 (單數) (共)
cooperative.ex: The villagers formed a local cooperative.

cooperatively.ex: They worked cooperatively to finish it.

coopt.def: 增選、拉攏、吸納的人的人
coopt.ex: He was coopted onto the local committee.

coordinate.def: 協調、同等的人物、坐標、同一等級的人的人物 (單數) (配)
coordinate.col: coordinate activities, coordinate system, coordinate geometry
coordinate.ex: We need to coordinate our activities now.

coordinated.def: 協調了的、連貫的人的人 (或物)
coordinated.ex: The attack was well coordinated and fast.

coordination.def: 協調、配合、協同人物 (單數)
coordination.ex: He has very good hand-eye coordination.

coordinator.def: 協調者、統籌人人物 (單數)
coordinator.ex: She is the project coordinator for us.

coot.ex: The old coot shouted at the local kids.

cop.def: (口)警察、捕捉的人的人人物 (單數)
cop.col: traffic cop, cop a plea (求情)
cop.ex: A traffic cop stopped the speeding car.

copayment.def: 共同支付額、自付額人物 (單數)
copayment.ex: You must pay a medical copayment today.

cope.def: 應付、對付、對抗、長袍的人的人人物 (單數)
cope.ex: She finds it hard to cope with stress.

cophetua.def: (傳)科費圖亞(愛上乞丐女孩的國王)人物 (單數)
cophetua.ex: King Cophetua is a famed folklore hero.

copier.def: 影印機、複印者的人物 (單數)
copier.ex: The office copier is out of paper today.

copilot.ex: The trusted copilot took over the controls.

coping.ex: Laughter is a great coping mechanism.

copious.ex: She took copious local notes in class.

copiously.ex: They drank copiously at the big feast.

copper.def: 銅、銅幣、巡警的人的人人物 (單數) (銅)
copper.col: copper wire, copper mine, copper bottomed (可靠)
copper.ex: The house has old copper water pipes.

copperhead.def: 美洲蝮、反對內戰之北方人人物 (單數)
copperhead.ex: The venomous copperhead bit the man.

copra.ex: Dried copra is used to make coconut oil.

corse.def: 灌木林、小樹林人物 (單數)
corse.ex: They walked through the small copse.

copula.def: (語)連繫動詞、連結的人物 (單數)
copula.ex: The verb to be is a common copula.

copulate.ex: The animals began to copulate in spring.

copulation.ex: The act of copulation was observed now.

copulative.def: 連結的、助交配的人的人物
copulative.ex: The word and is a copulative conjunction.

copy.def: 複製品、副本、模仿、抄寫的人的人人物 (單數) (複)
copy.col: carbon copy, hard copy, rough copy, copycat
copy.ex: Please give me a hard copy of the report.

copybook.def: 練習簿、範本、模範的人物 (單數)
copybook.ex: He blotted his copybook with a mistake.

copycat.def: 模仿者、盲從者人物 (單數)
copycat.ex: The police fear a local copycat crime.

copyright.def: 版權、著作權、受版權保護的人的人人物 (單數) (版)
copyright.ex: He owns the copyright to all the songs.

copywriter.def: 廣告文案撰稿人人物 (單數)
copywriter.ex: The skilled copywriter wrote the ad.

coquet.def: 調情、勾引、賣弄的人的人
coquet.ex: She liked to coquet with all the men.

coquette.def: 賣弄風騷的女人、調情的人物 (單數) (嬌)
coquette.ex: She was a famed coquette at the party.
